backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the university portal backend with data types and state for users, admissions, courses, fees, payments, hostels, results, and announcements, plus role-based access control and CRUD operations for all entities.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping implemented features (admin panel persistence, Naira currency formatting, role-based navigation, etc.) to their affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the University of Africa Portal SPA, mounting the React app at the `#root` div and loading the Vite entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the full TanStack Router route tree for the application, mapping all public, student, parent, staff, admin, and payment routes to their respective page components within a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog shown to newly authenticated users to collect their name, email, ID number, and role, then saves the profile to the backend via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/auth/RoleGuard.t: A React component that restricts access to children based on a required user role, showing login prompts, loading spinners, or access-denied messages as appropriate.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders the site-wide footer with university branding, quick navigation links, portal links, and contact information.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Main layout wrapper that composes Navigation, Footer, and conditionally renders a ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: Top navigation bar with role-based service menus (student, staff, parent, admin), Internet Identity login/logout, and a user avatar dropdown.
frontend/src/components/payments/StripeS: Admin UI card that prompts configuration of Stripe (secret key and allowed countries) when Stripe is not yet set up, hiding itself once configured.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and login status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, students, courses, fees, payments, results, admissions, hostel applications, announcements, and Stripe configuration using TanStack Query's useQuery and useMutation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for a deep navy and gold academic theme with light/dark mode variants and print utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
Admin dashboard layout with a sidebar navigation menu and quick-stat cards showing counts of students, courses, fee types, and pending admissions fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdmissionsManag: Admin page for viewing, searching, filtering, and updating the status (admit/reject) of student admission applications, protected by a RoleGuard for admin access.
frontend/src/pages/admin/FeeManagementPa: Admin page for creating new fee types (name, amount, programme, session) and displaying all existing fee types in a table, with form validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HostelManagemen: Admin page for viewing and managing hostel applications, with search/filter controls and approve/reject actions that call the backend mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MessagingPage.t: Admin page for composing and sending broadcast announcements to selected user roles, storing messages locally since backend messaging is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProgrammeManage: Admin page for adding new courses (code, name, semester, programme) via a form and displaying all existing courses in a table using backend query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ResultsManageme: Admin page for posting student academic results by selecting a course, entering a student ID, semester, grade, and score, then submitting to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/admin/StaffManagement: Admin page that fetches all user profiles, filters to staff role, and displays them in a searchable table showing name, staff ID, email, and role.
frontend/src/pages/admin/StudentManageme: Admin page for registering new students and viewing/searching existing student records via a form and filterable table.
Public page allowing users to check their admission status by JAMB registration number or full name, displaying admitted/rejected/pending results with appropriate icons and messaging.
frontend/src/pages/AdmissionsPage.tsx: Public-facing admissions landing page showing important dates, a step-by-step application guide, and navigation links to apply or check admission status.
frontend/src/pages/ApplicationFormPage.t: Multi-step admission application form collecting personal info, JAMB details, O'Level results, programme choice, and document uploads, then submitting via the useSubmitApplication mutation.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for the University of Africa portal displaying a hero section, stats, programmes list, admission notices, and role-based dashboard navigation for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/parent/ParentDashboar: Parent portal dashboard with a sidebar for navigation, a form to link a student by ID, and a grouped-by-semester view of the linked student's results.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Simple page shown when a payment is cancelled, informing the user no charges were made and providing links back to the fee statement or student dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Page that verifies a Stripe payment session by ID, records the payment in the backend, and displays success, loading, or error states with the payment reference.
Staff portal dashboard displaying a sidebar navigation and quick-stat cards showing total students, courses, and results fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/student/CourseRegistr: Student page for browsing, searching, and toggling course registrations, with courses grouped by semester and guarded by a student role check.
frontend/src/pages/student/FeeStatementP: Student fee statement page showing total paid and outstanding balances, a fee schedule with payment status, and a Stripe checkout flow for unpaid fees.
frontend/src/pages/student/HostelApplica: Student page for submitting and viewing hostel accommodation applications, showing form fields for room type and session, and displaying current application status (pending/approved/rejected) with appropriate styling.
frontend/src/pages/student/PaymentHistor: Displays a student's full payment transaction history in a table with a total-paid summary card, supporting receipt navigation and status badges.
frontend/src/pages/student/ReceiptPage.t: Renders a printable official payment receipt for a specific transaction, pulling payment and student profile data to display receipt details including fee type, amount, date, and reference.
frontend/src/pages/student/ResultsPage.t: Shows a student's academic results grouped by semester with GPA calculation, course details, and grade-colored badges, plus a link to the full transcript.
frontend/src/pages/student/StudentDashbo: Main student portal layout with a sidebar navigation menu and a dashboard overview showing quick stats for registered courses, unpaid fees, and results.
frontend/src/pages/student/TranscriptPag: A student transcript page that fetches results and courses, groups them by semester, calculates GPA, and renders a printable academic transcript with student info and per-semester grade tables.
frontend/src/utils/currency.ts: Utility functions for formatting Nigerian Naira currency using Intl.NumberFormat, supporting both plain numbers and bigint amounts from the backend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (navy, gold, success, sidebar, chart), box shadows, border radii, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a full university portal built on Internet Computer (Motoko + React), tracking architectural notes, existing features, and known issues such as broken course addition and admin panel data persistence.
